title: Fallen
html:
Stub. Fallen is Yahir's recurring frame for friends-from-Grants-Pass who died young — the named cluster surfaces in the Feb 20, 2026 "Fallen" memorial list (David Morris, Victor Ruiz, Spencer Sloan, Eric Cortez) and the in-the-moment grief letter David's suicide Oct 13 2024. The two prior in-vault deaths it folds in: Vic (mourned by David in the Jan 4 2024 dad in bad state note), and David himself, news broken by Cameron.
